name: Snowball Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 325°F. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, nuts, granulated sugar, butter and vanilla. Beat at low speed, scraping the bowl often, until well mixed, about 3-4 minutes. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 18 to 25 minutes, or until very lightly browned. Remove immediately. Roll in powdered sugar while still warm and again when cool. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
